# Brian Hart — bbhart.com

> Personal site of Brian Hart (Holly Springs, NC): long-form travel journals and
> occasional tech posts. Trips are documented day-by-day with locations,
> accommodations, activities, and dining, then summarized in trip recaps.

Brian Hart is a software engineering leader (formerly Head of Engineering at
GlossGenius; prior roles at LinkedIn, Jaunt VR, BT, Royal Caribbean, and Disney).
Profiles: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bhart, https://github.com/bbhart,
https://bsky.app/profile/bbhart.com

## Structured data

- [Travel Data API](https://bbhart.com/api/travel-data.json): machine-readable JSON of every travel post — trips, locations, accommodations, activities, dining, and a full timeline. Best starting point for questions about where Brian has traveled.
- [Sitemap](https://bbhart.com/sitemap.xml): all pages.

## Key pages

- [Trip Recaps](https://bbhart.com/recaps/): complete journals for each trip, one recap per trip.
- [About](https://bbhart.com/about/): who Brian is.
- [All posts](https://bbhart.com/posts/): reverse-chronological index.
